title: With 49% ownership, Hut 8 Corp. has piqued the interest of institutional investors
text: Hut 8 Corp Institutional Ownership Analysis. Institutional Ownership: 49% held by institutional investors, largest shareholder group. Top Shareholders: Coatue Management 9.8% (largest single), Second 7.2%, Michael Ho Board Member 6.8%. Concentration: Top 14 shareholders have combined 50% ownership, no dominant control. Insider Ownership: 11% valued at ~$253 million in $2.3 billion company. CEO Asher Genoot: 3.3% ownership. General Public: 30% ownership by individual investors. Institutional Significance: Substantial stake makes stock sensitive to institutional trading actions. Large pools of capital can significantly influence stock price through coordinated buying/selling. No single shareholder with dominant control reduces concentration risk. Mix of insider, institutional, and retail ownership reflects institutional confidence.
